outputs: Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
warnings: If the response includes water, assume facilities jurisdiction unless the water is standing in a room that has been administratively removed.
The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
